description: Detects integer overflow risks in C: unchecked multiplication in malloc size arguments, signed integer passed as size to memcpy. Simplified from Rust: flags all binary_expression nodes (cannot filter to arithmetic operators or check operand types without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Binary expression detected -- verify arithmetic expressions used as malloc/calloc/realloc size arguments are checked for integer overflow; avoid signed integers as size parameters to memcpy
